name: Wave Motion - Transverse Waves
description: Demonstrates transverse wave motion with 25 spheres oscillating in a sine wave pattern. Observe wave properties: Amplitude (A), Wavelength (λ), Frequency (f), and Wave Speed (v = fλ). Each particle oscillates perpendicular to wave propagation direction - classic simple harmonic motion.

functionCalls.code: const objects = []; const numParticles = 25; const spacing = 1.8; const startX = -numParticles * spacing / 2; for(let i = 0; i < numParticles; i++) { const hue = (i / numParticles) * 240; const id = `wave_particle_${i}`; objects.push({ id, type: 'Sphere', position: [startX + i * spacing, 6, 0], radius: 0.45, color: `hsl(${hue}, 80%, 55%)`, nonPhysics: true }); const phaseOffset = i * 0.4; globalNonPhysicsEngine.animateObject(id, { code: `const amplitude = 3.5; const frequency = 1.5; mesh.position.y = 6 + amplitude * Math.sin(time * frequency * Math.PI * 2 + ${phaseOffset});` }); } const groundObj = { id: 'ground_plane', type: 'Box', dimensions: [60, 0.2, 20], position: [0, 0, 0], color: '#2C3E50', isStatic: true, nonPhysics: true }; objects.push(groundObj); const refLineTop = { id: 'ref_line_top', type: 'Box', dimensions: [50, 0.05, 0.05], position: [0, 9.5, 0], color: '#E74C3C', isStatic: true, nonPhysics: true, opacity: 0.6 }; objects.push(refLineTop); const refLineBottom = { id: 'ref_line_bottom', type: 'Box', dimensions: [50, 0.05, 0.05], position: [0, 2.5, 0], color: '#E74C3C', isStatic: true, nonPhysics: true, opacity: 0.6 }; objects.push(refLineBottom); const refLineCenter = { id: 'ref_line_center', type: 'Box', dimensions: [50, 0.08, 0.08], position: [0, 6, 0], color: '#3498DB', isStatic: true, nonPhysics: true, opacity: 0.8 }; objects.push(refLineCenter); return objects;
